# FlaxseedsPro Documentation
> Technical documentation for premium flaxseed fractions — hull, kernel, powder, gum, and oil.
> Main website: https://flaxseedspro.com
> Full reference: https://docs.flaxseedspro.com/llms-full.txt

## About
FlaxseedsPro is a B2B supplier of technically-defined flaxseed fractions. Facility: HACCP / ISO 22000 / FSSC 22000 / Organic (USDA/EU) / Kosher (OU) / Non-GMO / Gluten-Free.

## Products
- [Flaxseed Hull](https://docs.flaxseedspro.com/products/flaxseed-hull-spec/): TDF 70-80%, SDG 7-10 mg/g, WHC 6-8 g/g
- [Flaxseed Kernel](https://docs.flaxseedspro.com/products/flaxseed-kernel-spec/): Protein 30-35%, Fat 40-45%, ALA 55-60%
- [Flaxseed Powder](https://docs.flaxseedspro.com/products/flaxseed-powder-spec/): Full-fat (protein 20-25%) / Defatted (protein 40-50%), 20-100 mesh
- [Flaxseed Gum](https://docs.flaxseedspro.com/products/flaxseed-gum-spec/): Polysaccharide 75-85%, viscosity 500-5000 cP (1% solution)
- [Flaxseed Oil](https://docs.flaxseedspro.com/products/flaxseed-oil-spec/): ALA 55-60%, tocopherols 800-1200 ppm, 15 quality parameters

## Processing
- Cleaning: 10K Gauss Magnet → Vibrating Screen → Destoner → Color Sorter (8 MT/hr)
- Dehulling: Centrifugal / Roller → Air / Gravity classification (3 MT/hr, 85-90% efficiency)
- Grinding: Hammer (2800-3600 rpm) / Disc / Pin + Cryogenic (-150°C)
- Oil: Cold press (<40°C) → Plate filter → Polish filter → N2 flush
- Gum: Aqueous extraction → Ethanol precipitation → Spray drying
- Drying: Fluidised bed / Microwave / Steam / IR (3 MT/hr)

## Quality
- HACCP: 5 CCPs (metal, oxidation, solvent, moisture, metal detection)
- COA provided per batch: moisture, protein, fat, ALA, microbiology
- Full micro panel: SPC, Y&M, coliforms, E. coli, Salmonella, L. mono, B. cereus
- On-site lab: NIR, GC-FID, HPLC, Soxhlet, Kjeldahl, microbiology

## Key Specifications
- ALA Omega-3: 52-57% (seed), 55-60% (oil) — AOCS Ce 1j-07
- TDF: 27-28% (whole seed), 70-80% (hull) — AOAC 991.43
- Protein: 18-24% (seed), 30-35% (kernel), 40-50% (defatted) — AOAC 984.13
- Peroxide Value: ≤2.0 meq/kg (oil) — AOCS Cd 8b-90
- Shelf Life: 12mo (whole seed), 6-9mo (milled), 18mo (oil)
- Packaging: 20-25kg bags, 500kg-1MT totes, 200L drums, IBC, flexitank

## Links
- Main website: https://flaxseedspro.com
- Products: https://flaxseedspro.com/flaxseed-products/
- Documentation: https://docs.flaxseedspro.com
- Contact: https://flaxseedspro.com/contact/
